release_notes:
- v2.16.1 adds Alibaba vision and omni model support, GPT-4.1/GPT-4.5-preview, OpenAI o3/o4-mini, Gemini 2.5, Grok 3, Claude 4, Moonshot model updates, and 302.AI provider support.
- Fixes include Mistral icon detection, first-message enforcement, Gemini/Claude multimodal image upload regexes, o1/o3 markdown encouragement, unit test failures, and duplicate links.
- The frontend build was migrated to Vite and documentation/translations were updated.
